similarTracks.title: Similar Tracks
similarTracks.noResults: No external similar track results were returned
similarTracks.missingLastFmKey: Last.fm is unavailable: this build has no bundled API key
similarTracks.missingListenBrainzSeed: ListenBrainz returned no results: this track has no registered MBID
similarTracks.providerError: {source} query failed: the third-party service returned no valid result
similarTracks.errorNoSeed: This track has no usable external match record. Check the title and artist, then retry.
similarTracks.errorAcoustIdMissing: Audio identification is not enabled: add a fingerprint matching key in Settings first.
similarTracks.errorNetwork: External service connection failed. Please retry later.
similarTracks.errorTimeout: External service timed out. Please retry later.
similarTracks.errorRateLimited: External service received too many requests. Please retry later.
similarTracks.lastfmSettingDesc1: Release builds prefer the app-bundled key when requesting Last.fm similar tracks.
similarTracks.lastfmSettingDesc2: Optional. Add your own API Key to override it, or to enable Last.fm in builds without a bundled key.
